content.json:
# SpyCloud Executive Summary
**Cross-Table Risk Overview** - High-level organizational risk posture consolidating all SpyCloud data sources into a single executive view.

> This workbook provides aggregated metrics across all SpyCloud tables for executive reporting and risk assessment.

---

parameters.name: SeverityFilter
parameters.query: SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL | distinct severity | order by severity desc
parameters.label: Severity

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(Label:string, Value:long, Order:int)["Breach Watchlist", 0, 1, "Compass Records", 0, 2, "Stolen Cookies", 0, 3, "CAP Alerts", 0, 4, "Exposures", 0, 5, "Investigations", 0, 6, "MDE Actions", 0, 7, "CA Actions", 0, 8]),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize v=count() | extend Label="Breach Watchlist", Order=1 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(SpyCloudCompassData_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize v=count() | extend Label="Compass Records", Order=2 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(SpyCloudSipCookies_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize v=count() | extend Label="Stolen Cookies", Order=3 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(SpyCloudCAP_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize v=count() | extend Label="CAP Alerts", Order=4 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(SpyCloudExposure_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize v=count() | extend Label="Exposures", Order=5 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(SpyCloudInvestigations_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize v=count() | extend Label="Investigations", Order=6 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(Spycloud_MDE_Logs_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize v=count() | extend Label="MDE Actions", Order=7 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(SpyCloud_ConditionalAccessLogs_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize v=count() | extend Label="CA Actions", Order=8 | project Label, Value=v, Order)
| summarize Value=max(Value) by Label, Order
| order by Order asc
content.title: Cross-Platform Intelligence Summary

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(union
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize Count=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d) | extend Source="BreachWatchlist"),
(SpyCloudCompassData_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize Count=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d) | extend Source="Compass"),
(SpyCloudExposure_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize Count=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d) | extend Source="Exposure"),
(SpyCloudCAP_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize Count=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d) | extend Source="CAP")
| project TimeGenerated, Count, Source
| order by TimeGenerated asc)
content.title: Cross-Source Ingestion Trend (Daily)

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(let watchlistUsers = SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize BWExposures=count(), BWMaxSev=max(severity) by email;
let compassUsers = SpyCloudCompassData_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize CompassRecords=count() by email;
let capUsers = SpyCloudCAP_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize CAPAlerts=count() by email;
let sipUsers = SpyCloudSipCookies_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize StolenCookies=count() by email;
watchlistUsers
| join kind=leftouter compassUsers on email
| join kind=leftouter capUsers on email
| join kind=leftouter sipUsers on email
| extend RiskScore = BWMaxSev + coalesce(CompassRecords, 0) + coalesce(CAPAlerts, 0) * 2 + coalesce(StolenCookies, 0) * 3
| extend RiskLevel = case(RiskScore >= 50, "CRITICAL", RiskScore >= 30, "HIGH", RiskScore >= 10, "MEDIUM", "LOW")
| top 20 by RiskScore desc
| project User=email, RiskLevel, RiskScore, BWExposures, CompassRecords=coalesce(CompassRecords, 0), CAPAlerts=coalesce(CAPAlerts, 0), StolenCookies=coalesce(StolenCookies, 0))
content.title: Top 20 Highest Risk Users (Cross-Source Composite Score)
Remediation Effectiveness

content.query:
union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudBreachWatchlist_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend SeverityLabel = case(severity == 25, "Critical", severity == 20, "High", severity == 5, "Medium", severity == 2, "Low", "Other")
| summarize Count=count() by SeverityLabel)
content.title: Overall Severity Distribution
